The '''''Mud Sloth''''' was a [[Adventurer|Verpine Adventurer]] starship of the Model 201, Production Group E subtype, with the individual registation number NR80-109399,<ref name="SL">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref> owned by [[Akanah Norand Goss Pell]]. It was used during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] to locate the [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] Circle and [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Luke Skywalker's mother]].

The design of the ship predated the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. According to [[New Republic]] records, the first owner of the ship had been [[Andras Pell]], an inhabitant of [[Carratos]] born around 50 BBY, passing around [[15 ABY/Legends|15 ABY]] to his younger widow Akanah.<ref name="SL" /><ref name="date">In ''[[Before the Storm]]'', Akanah indicates that she was around thirty-one years old in 16 ABY ("That was nineteen years ago. I was twelve"), and she states in ''[[Shield of Lies]]'' that Andras was "a man thirty-six years my senior", implying that he was born approximately sixty-seven years before 16 ABY; however, much of her narrative is unverified, and in ''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' she states that she was "ten years old when the Emperor's stormtroopers swept across half the galaxy", which may mean that her true age is nearer forty-five.</ref> However, Akanah was not in possession of the key to the maintenance hatch in the deck of the internal cabin. and a significant effort had been made to conceal the ship's identity, notably the fitting of an expensive "smuggler's kit" which upoloaded a new counterfeit registry every time the ship jumped to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], which Akanah claimed had been installed for her on [[Golkus]] by an [[Outlaw tech/Legends|outlaw tech]] she knew there.<ref name="SL" />

Around half a year after coming into possession of the ship, Akanah found [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and then took him on a journey searching for the remaining Fallanassi and among them his supposed [[Nashira|mother]]. The ship had no formal name, but was christened the ''Mud Sloth'' by Luke due to its speed—or lack of.<ref name="BtS">''[[Before the Storm]]''</ref>

The two piloted the ship to planets [[Lucazec/Legends|Lucazec]],<ref name="BtS" /> [[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]], and [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]].<ref name="SL" /> Eventually, the two discovered the Fallanassi were hidden on [[J't'p'tan]], and after a detour via [[Utharis]], they made their way to the planet.. Along with the Fallanassi leader [[Wialu]] they took the ship to rendezvous with the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]], arriving aboard the command ship [[Intrepid (Endurance-class)|''Intrepid'']] shortly before the [[Battle of N'zoth]]. After the end of the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], the two parted ways, with Akanah departing with the Fallanassi, and Luke taking the ''Mud Sloth'' to find the [[Lady Luck/Legends|Lady Luck]]'' and rescue [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lano Calrissian]].<ref name="TT">''[[Tyrant's Test]]''</ref>

Most of the ship's systems remained unmodified, including a sublight speed rating of 2.5 and a [[Hyperdrive motivator/Legends|hyperdrive motivator]] of Block 1 standard, but the [[navigational deflector array]] had been upgraded to Block 3 standard. The ship's interior contained a relatively spacious flight deck with two crew couches, and a single-width [[Sleeper (furniture)|sleeper]] and a small [[Refresher/Legends|refresher]] unit, both screened from the main interior space by curtains. The [[meal-service console]] was malfunctioning - although it offered three drink selections, it would not dispense food, forcing Akanah to make use of [[Ration pack/Legends|ration packs]] stored in the cargo hold.<ref name="BtS" />
